events.output: Stakeholder discussion skipped by user. Proceeding with agent-led elicitation.

Agent-led elicitation across 5 domains. Key findings: (1) root cause is discoverability gap in get_skills API, (2) meta/rules.toon describes behaviors but doesn't reference formal skills by ID, (3) help tool bootstrap doesn't mention universal skills, (4) three implementation approaches identified (server-side, TOON-only, hybrid).
3 new assumptions collected: A-03-01 (rules don't reference skill IDs - validated), A-03-02 (help doesn't mention universal skills - validated), A-03-03 (three approaches exist - validated).
Created 03-requirements-elicitation.md with problem statement, stakeholders, context/integration points, scope (in/out/deferred), 5 success criteria, and elicitation log.
Updated 02-assumptions-log.md: added 3 new assumptions (all validated via code analysis in iteration 2). Running totals: 11 total, 5 validated, 2 invalidated, 1 partially validated, 3 open.
Iteration 2 convergence. All 3 new assumptions (A-03-01, A-03-02, A-03-03) were code-resolvable and validated. Remaining 3 open assumptions are stakeholder-dependent (A-02-04, A-02-05, A-02-07).
